global.title: Tesla puts Starlink antenna in Cybercab
global.summary: Tesla and Starlink say SpaceX’s satellite internet is now “directly integrated” into the Cybercab, Tesla’s dedicated robotaxi. The reveal came through a pair of posts on X on Monday, with a cutaway diagram showing a Starlink antenna sitting in the vehicle’s roof. Neither company explained why a car

global.title: The Hyundai IONIQ 5 is flying off dealer lots, and it’s getting harder to find
global.summary: The IONIQ 5 is a hot seller right now, and Hyundai dealers are reportedly running out of inventory.

global.title: The US’s first UL 3700 balcony solar microinverter is here
global.summary: Hoymiles has launched the HiFlow Pro, the first US microinverter certified to meet UL 3700, North America’s new safety standard for plug-in balcony solar.

global.title: Tesla ‘Full Self-Driving’ got me a speeding ticket, and Tesla killed the fix
global.summary: I got a speeding ticket this weekend while using Tesla’s Full Self-Driving. The car was driving itself in Standard mode on FSD when it took me up to 78 km/h in a 50 km/h zone. A police officer coming the other way clocked me on radar and pulled me over on the spot. I’d turned FSD on less than two mi

global.title: Hyundai’s $5B battery plant opens with enough capacity to power 300,000 EVs a year
global.summary: Hyundai opened its new $5 billion EV battery plant in Georgia with enough capacity to power about 300,000 electric vehicles a year. The first of which will be used in the three-row IONIQ 9.

global.title: EGO 21-inch electric Select Cut and Touch Drive mower + 2x batteries new $527 low, Jackery power stations up to 50% off, more
global.summary: Leading this week’s Monday Green Deals is a new all-time low price on the popular EGO Power+ 56V 21-inch Cordless Electric Select Cut and Touch Drive Self-Propelled Lawn Mower with 2x 4.0Ah batteries for $527 (saving you $252). global.title: Ford’s new EV pickup caught at a Tesla Supercharger
global.summary: Ford’s upcoming midsize electric pickup will start at around $30,000 with a native NACS port to recharge at Tesla Superchargers.

global.title: Principia is here to win, and it won’t hesitate to help others do the same
global.summary: The sun has just about risen on this year’s Electrek Formula Sun Grand Prix (FSGP), the pre-qualifying race before the renowned American Solar Challenge. global.title: Will we soon see sodium-ion batteries on electric bikes?
global.summary: For the last couple of years, sodium-ion batteries have been one of the most talked-about “next big things” in the battery world. global.summary: Genesis is going on the offensive as the Korean luxury brand expands into new segments.
